summary: Frontend retest of newly added sections (HydraFacial, BridalMakeup, HairServices, Offers), 10-item navigation and Google Maps embed on New Look Beauty Parlour site. All targeted features verified working. Testing type: frontend-only (backend skipped per request).

verified_features.desktop_nav_10_links: All 10 nav-link-* testids present and functional (home, about, services, hydra-facial, bridal-makeup, hair-services, gallery, offers, testimonials, contact). Home scrolls to top (scrollY=0). Each section-link scrolls its target #id into viewport (verified hydra-facial direct-click: section top=0.15px, scrollY=9344).
verified_features.hydra_facial_section: data-testid='hydra-facial-section' present. Contains 5 method step <li> items and data-testid='hydra-book-btn'. NOTE: request expected 'hydra-step-*' testids but implementation uses <li> only (5 items visible, matches spec count).
verified_features.bridal_makeup_section: data-testid='bridal-makeup-section' present with all 4 packages bridal-pkg-0..3 rendered.
verified_features.hair_services_section: data-testid='hair-services-section' present. 6 hair service rows rendered. NOTE: testids are 'hair-service-{n}' (not 'hair-row-*' as in review request) — 6 items confirmed.
verified_features.offers_section: data-testid='offers-section' present with all 4 offer-card-0..3 rendered.
verified_features.contact_maps_embed: data-testid='contact-maps-embed-link' anchor contains an <iframe> pointing to maps.google.com?q=New%20Look%20Beauty%20Parlour%20Akividu... — embed working.
verified_features.mobile_menu_390x800: nav-menu-btn opens mobile-menu; all 10 mobile-nav-* links present (home..contact).
verified_features.appointment_form: form testids form-name, form-phone, form-service, form-date, form-time, form-submit all present. Form fill + submit fires flow (WhatsApp text appears in DOM after submit). Note: actual testids differ from review request 'appointment-*-input' — actual are 'form-*'. Iteration 2 already validated end-to-end POST /api/appointments; not re-verified in depth here.

action_items: Minor doc/testid mismatch: review request lists 'hydra-step-*', 'hair-row-*', 'appointment-name-input/appointment-phone-input/appointment-submit-btn' but code uses <li> (no per-step testid), 'hair-service-{n}', and 'form-name/form-phone/form-submit'. Either update code testids to match spec or update spec. Recommend adding data-testid='hydra-step-{i}' to the 5 method items and data-testid='hair-row-{i}' aliases for consistency.
critical_code_review_comments: Console warning: 'Please ensure that the container has a non-static position (relative/fixed/absolute) to ensure scroll offset is calculated correctly.' Emitted twice on load — likely from Lenis scroll init. Minor, non-blocking.

Lenis smooth-scroll animation between distant sections can take >1.8s; long-distance nav clicks (e.g. services -> hydra-facial) may appear un-scrolled in short-wait automation. Not a real bug — direct click from top works fine.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new-nav + new-section features verified on desktop 1920x1080 and mobile 390x800. Actual testids differ slightly from review-request naming (hydra-step-*, hair-row-*, appointment-*-input) — implementation uses <li>, hair-service-{n}, and form-*. Google Maps iframe is present inside contact-maps-embed-link anchor. Waiting ~2-2.5s after nav click is required due to Lenis smooth scroll.
